notes: ai-memory-svc writes agent state to DynamoDB table pipeline-states, which breached its provisioned write-capacity (commit 6f8a0c2e doubled the per-step checkpoint writes), so DynamoDB returned ProvisionedThroughputExceeded / throttling. ai-agent-svc calls ai-memory-svc and RETRIES aggressively on throttle, so ai-agent-svc shows the LOUDEST signal (retry storm: huge call volume, CPU, error count) — and PAGES. platform-api then surfaces AI runtime 500s. TRAP: retry amplification makes the CALLER ai-agent-svc loudest, but the origin is the throttled memory store ai-memory-svc. A model that blames ai-agent (the retry amplifier) is wrong.
_design_note: Paged on ai-agent-svc because it shows the biggest spike (call volume, errors, CPU). A retry storm makes the RETRYING caller look like the epicenter — check whether the volume is amplification of a downstream throttle.
